---
title: "Louisa Jane Bennett"
---

## Louisa Jane Bennett

**Dates:** (surrey 1832-1909 Surrey)

### Description

Hon. Lady Superintendent and founder of the Wimbledon Art College for Ladies

### Biography

[Census returns, register of deaths]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 9th 1884

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
